answer: Cresta Foods exports premium Guar Gum Powder in food-grade (100, 200, 300 mesh) and industrial grades from certified manufacturers in Rajasthan, India. Available with viscosity 3500–7000+ CPS, FSSAI, ISO 22000, FSSC 22000 certified.
We export premium Dehydrated White, Red, and Pink Onion products from Mahuva, Gujarat. Available as Flakes, Powder, Kibbled, Chopped, and Minced with max 6% moisture and 24-month shelf life.
Our standard minimum order quantity is 1 FCL (20ft container). For first-time buyers, we can discuss LCL options. Please contact us for specific requirements.
Yes, we provide pre-shipment product samples for qualified buyers. Share your specification sheet or intended application and we'll dispatch samples promptly.
Our supply chain partners hold FSSAI, FSSC 22000, ISO 22000, HACCP, APEDA, Halal, Kosher, BRCGS, and GMP certifications. Full COA from NABL-accredited labs is provided with every shipment.
Standard lead time is 2–4 weeks from order confirmation and advance payment. We provide real-time production and dispatch updates.
We offer FOB (Mundra Port), CIF, and CFR. Payment terms are typically LC at sight or TT advance. We are open to discussing terms based on order size.
You can reach us at info@crestafoods.com or fill out the contact form on our website. Our team will respond within 24 hours.
Guar Korma (40–55% protein) and Guar Churi (35–45% protein) are our premium animal feed ingredients suitable for cattle, poultry, aqua, and swine feed formulations.
Yes, ETO Treated and Steam Sterilized onion products are available upon request for markets requiring specific microbial specifications.
